summary:
POWER GRID THREATS AND PREPAREDNESS: Brandon shares prophetic warnings regarding an impending cyberattack on the United States power grid, referencing a video by Perry Stone. He states that a source indicates the attack could occur between August and the upcoming elections, potentially acting as an October surprise. Brandon notes that major cities, specifically mentioning Philadelphia, Chicago, and New York, could face power outages lasting up to three weeks. To prepare for this scenario, Brandon advises securing alternative energy sources, such as solar power for medical equipment and gasoline, propane, or natural gas generators for long-term sustainability, especially since gas stations and banks would be rendered inoperable.

ECONOMIC INSTABILITY AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon recounts a vision concerning the United States economy, which he describes as a massive structure resembling the Hoover Dam with the words United States of America Economy written on it. He observes fifty-gallon drums labeled Dollar Crash and notes that the dam is developing severe stress cracks, leaking foul sludge, symbolizing an imminent economic fracture. Despite predicting that 2025 could be a very dark year, Brandon mentions a supernatural wealth transfer intended for the remnant, stating that God will guide them on how to invest and protect their finances before the natural economic collapse occurs.

GLOBAL CONFLICT AND TERRORISM: Brandon warns of an impending, severe World War and shares a prophetic message read by his wife, Diana. The message indicates that Islamic terrorists will force Israel and the United States into a full-scale war, referencing a Psalm 83 and Obadiah war. The conflict involves Israel attacking Iran's nuclear capabilities and subsequent Iranian retaliation, leading to terrorism within America characterized by murder and property destruction. Furthermore, the message prophesies the destruction of Damascus according to Isaiah 17 and warns of a specific chemical attack in Tel Aviv involving fifty-gallon drums originating from the mountains of Iran, causing blisters on victims.

DOMESTIC UNREST AND NATIONAL AWAKENING: Brandon relays warnings about severe food and water shortages that will lead to lengthy food lines and riots igniting racism, expanding beyond places like Missouri. He mentions that the seventy-year period of grace and prosperity granted to the United States and Western nations following the World War II victory over Hitler has concluded, ushering in final judgments. However, Brandon emphasizes that America will be a sheep nation experiencing a shaking meant to awaken the church. He predicts a pure revival featuring brush arbor churches and strict separation from lukewarm faith, asserting that no politician, including Donald Trump, can save the country, as salvation will only come through a national spiritual awakening.
rawData: [August 17, 2024]-[Sounding the alarm - exposing the enemy's plans about things he’s trying to do - a call to prayer]-[https://youtu.be/IImgvkZzmiU]-[Hey, good morning, family. How are y'all doing today? Well, I have some things on my heart to talk to you about. I saw some things in the spirit, and I'm going to talk to you about it. First off, I just want to say thank you for all your support, the likes, the subscriptions, all of it. It is a blessing to our family, and we just want to say thank you, because you are helping get the gospel spread throughout the whole world. Literally, people's lives are being changed, and I just want to say thank you. All I know is that God put me on here and He told me to come and tell you all the things that are heavy in the spirit that we can pray about. Some things we can stop, some things we can't, but I know beyond a shadow of a doubt Jesus is coming, and He's coming soon. So I want you to be looking up, for your redemption draws nigh. Late last night, I was praying and I saw a video that Perry Stone put out. There are a lot of times I'm praying and seeing stuff and I'm like, 'Lord, is there anybody else seeing anything? Is there anybody else having warnings about what's coming other than me?' I don't want to be a lone ranger out there, and I want to know that there are other prophetic confirmations about what's coming and about warnings. I clicked on the video to see what Perry Stone said the Lord showed him. In that video, which I'm going to show you a little clip of right here—to protect this man, I will never tell you what state he's in, what city he's in, or who he is—he said the same person who reported that, and it was accurate two weeks later, has said the next attack is going to be the power grid in the United States. The US grid, and I've seen many articles on this, is extremely vulnerable to cyberattacks. This person has stated from his information there will be an attack coming somewhere between August and the election. People are talking about an October surprise; maybe this is the October surprise, I don't know, but it will happen at some point. If it doesn't happen this year, this is absolutely going to happen. So you all see what he's saying? He has a warning from the Holy Ghost, it sounds like, from this man. I don't know who that man was, he doesn't even say, but it's a warning about them attacking the power grid from August to the elections in certain cities. I saw Philadelphia, I saw Chicago, I saw New York. I saw major cities going without power for three weeks. The Lord warned me to prepare and to tell you all. He's saying that this guy from the dark web is saying it would be three weeks, just like the Lord showed me. Sit and ask yourself: how would my family, my grandbabies, and I survive if we had to go two to three weeks without electricity? Because it's very possible in some places that an outage could last that long. I got that in prayer. I don't have secret intel, I don't work for the CIA. People ask me if I work for the CIA; I work for the Holy Spirit, and He will show you things to come and He will warn you so that you're not caught off guard. He always comes to His people and warns them if you're close to Him. It's not just about me, it's about the body of Christ. It's about you building a relationship with the Lord. He wants to talk to you and tell you things to come. I'm nothing special; I want you to understand that He comes and talks to me because I've developed a relationship with Him. So, He will tell me things and He warns me of a lot. I usually say if the Lord hasn't said anything, I take it that it's not going to happen. Does that make sense? Because we are that close. I just believe with all my heart He's going to warn me, and if He doesn't say it, I don't believe it's coming in that area. If He warns me it's coming, that means He wants me to pray about it so we can stop it. When Perry Stone came out and said this and warned about the three weeks of power outage, it went alongside what the Holy Spirit warned me to tell you all. Let every word be established. There's something going on with the power grid. I told you all I believe if you are a person who has to have electricity for medical equipment or whatever, that you should try, if you can, to get some kind of solar power from Amazon. That would help you charge your equipment and devices. Then the Lord showed me three-phase power generators—like gasoline, propane, and natural gas generators—that would sustain long-term power. It would not run out of fuel because gas stations and banks would be closed during these power outages. It was a serious situation that they were going to try to do. He was even talking about an October surprise. Now, is it the October surprise? I told you all I believe there's a major event going to take place in October. I'm still praying over it. If it comes and goes and nothing happens, it's because we're praying over it. That's what the Lord's called me to do. I am on this channel to pray that things don't happen. When the Lord warns you of a tragic event coming, we want to be able to use our authority and pray against things to stop them. This is what I saw in the spirit concerning the economy. I saw the dam again, and the Lord showed me it looked like the Hoover Dam. It was a massive dam that said 'United States of America' with 'Economy' written on the side in black letters. Remember I told you I've seen it twice? There were all these fifty-gallon drums stacked up with 'Dollar Crash' written on the side. Well, this time the Lord showed me the dam had cracks all in the front of it. Some of them were big stress cracks, some of them were pin-fine cracks, but there was a center place in the middle of the dam and, all of a sudden, it was like spider-webbing out, splitting all around the center and splintering out. Some were big and were leaking that sludge. It was nasty; you could see putrid, gross, stinky stuff coming out of those cracks in this United States Economy Dam. The Lord showed me that dam is starting to get stress cracks and starting to break. Now, some people say, 'Do you believe this is going to happen in 2025?' I hear in part and I see in part. What I perceive in the spirit is something that is coming, like imminent. I believe 2025 has the potential to be a very dark year. I've seen a great storm coming after the elections. I said something will take place in October and, like I said, if we change things in the spirit, I don't know—people say that's a cop-out, but no, I'm just telling you what I see and pray about. I've seen 2025 as being a very dark year. Regarding the timing, I saw a supernatural wealth transfer coming for the body of Christ before the natural stuff happened over the economy. The Lord said, 'I will always take care of my beloved.' For the remnant who are listening, He will speak to them and show them things to invest in and what to do with their money to protect it. He would supply and take care of His kids. But I'm trying to warn you all that there are very hard days coming for some, and there will be people that will not make it. I'm telling you, a major war is fixing to break out. We are about to see a major World War start up, and it's going to be very bad. A lot of people are going to die. People don't want to hear that, and they say we're going to be out of here with the Rapture. I pray you're right, but from what I have seen, we're still here for some of this stuff. There are more people than just me warning about this. I want you to listen to this word that Diana is about to give you. Hi everybody, Diana here, Brandon's wife. I'm just going to read this. The Lord spoke to me again today and He said to warn America again: these Islamic terrorists will only stop when they are killed. They have been brainwashed from infancy. This will force the hand of Israel and even the USA into war. In my opinion, the Psalm 83 Obadiah war is on our doorstep now and cannot be held back much longer. The war will change our world. These present Middle East conflicts will escalate rapidly if not held back by God's mercy, and we will soon be in a full-scale war. Soon Israel will attack Iran to destroy their nuclear capabilities. Iran will also strike back. This will also hit us in America, not just the Middle East. There will be terrorism here in America as well, with both murder and destruction of property. The House of Esau Edom will be destroyed by God, as it is written by the prophet Obadiah and other prophets in the Scriptures. Damascus will be destroyed very soon according to Isaiah 17. Obadiah wrote as they have spoken against Israel, so shall it be done to them. But this will involve much collateral damage both in Israel and America. We will be shaken to the core in the West, both economically and spiritually. God must allow this to awaken the church and bring about national repentance in both America and Israel. Prayer warriors, pray for protection of Israel, especially Tel Aviv. I saw an attempted chemical attack there in a vision today. Pray also for protection in America's major cities. God is separating cities and places of refuge where He will supernaturally protect and provide for His people. Make sure that you are exactly where God wants you, dear saints of God. Riots igniting racism will begin in other places than just Missouri when food and water become harder to get. Beloved, wake up! Yeshua is coming for His bride very soon. When Yeshua came to me in November of 1989, He gave me a panoramic vision download of the future. One of the things He told me was: 'I have given the United States of America and the Western nation 70 years of grace, peace, and prosperity that is unparalleled in all history. This is because of what you did for my people in World War II by defeating Hitler and the Nazi regime. When the 70 years have finished, there will be the final judgments to come upon the earth.' I have not been allowed to state this with this clarity and boldness until now. It has been locked in my heart. I have written about it in a veiled way in the past, but now I can openly say the Lord spoke those words to me personally. We just passed the 70th anniversary of the world war victory of World War II. Lord, I have been faithful by your grace to obediently write what you commanded me today. I want you to go back to this about the chemical attack in Tel Aviv. I saw 50-gallon drums coming out of the mountains, and the Lord warned me they were going to use a chemical attack. I know that the Lord showed me that they were hiding them in Damascus. I think it's interesting that this person is seeing the exact same thing—a type and shadow. Again, we hear in part and we see in part. The Lord is warning His prophetic voices to pray against this. I saw blisters all over these people's hands—the children, the women, all of them. It was a surprise thing; nobody was expecting it. It came out of the mountains in Iran. Pray also for protection in America's major cities. Now God is separating cities and places of refuge where He will supernaturally provide for His people. Make sure you are exactly where God wants you. Riots igniting racism will begin in other places when food and water become harder to get. What did I warn you all about? I told you all about food lines miles long. Here is another prophetic warning about food shortages. This is so spot-on from what the Lord showed me; it's another piece of the puzzle. Another thing—read this part again. We just passed the 70th anniversary of the victory of World War II. So, it's 70 years. The Lord said He was giving us a special blessing, and that ended recently. Look at the patterns of the grace period that God has given America. Brandon, America will not be a goat nation, they will be a sheep nation. He said there will be a shaking to awaken. He said a lot of people will call this a great Ichabod, that the glory has departed, but it is not a great Ichabod. He said it is a time to awaken. The bride is awakening the church, and I'm telling you all I believe very sobering days are coming to the body of Christ, waking them up for one last call and one last push for an outpouring of the Spirit of God with arbor churches, brush arbor churches, where they will have great revival. I'm talking about a pure Holy Ghost fire, a separation unto God. Everybody says, 'Trump's going to come and he's going to save America, everything's going to be okay.' I'm telling you now, by the Spirit of God, there is no man that will save America other than the Lord Jesus Christ. It will be an awakening unto God that saves America. There will not be anybody in Congress or the Senate that will stop what I saw coming. It will only be by the grace and the mercy of God and a great revival—preachers preaching repentance, holiness, and separation. We are called to be the light of the earth and the salt, not to be lukewarm. He said if you're lukewarm, He would spew you out of His mouth. There's a separation coming. You are either on the right side or you're on the other side. There will be a great falling away in the midst of this. Some will say, 'I thought I served God the whole time,' but no, you were lukewarm. You thought you could ride the fence. Woe unto you that think they can ride the fence and not be on fire for Jesus. You have got to get your house in order. We are not bowing down to Baal. We will worship Jesus in this house. We are not ashamed of the Lord Jesus Christ. I believe with all my heart in the baptism of the Holy Spirit with tongues and praying with fire. I believe in healing, deliverance, and casting out devils. Freely it's been given, and freely I give it out. That's why I never ask for a dime. Jesus is coming soon, and you all need to have your hearts ready because we're running out of time. I've told you three voices tonight: Perry Stone, this man Maurice, and me. That's biblical, to bring out three people who are hearing that something is coming. A great storm is coming. It's not a call to fear; it's a call to prayer, to get right before the Father and get ready for His great harvest of souls. Let's pray right now together for your family members to come to Jesus. The Lord took care of the lilies of the field and the sparrows; He loves you and He's going to provide for you. If you've been away for a long time, it doesn't matter. The moment you come back to Him, just like the prodigal son, He ran back and killed His fatted calf for him. He gave him a beautiful robe. Jesus is waiting on you today. You may say, 'I've messed up too bad,' but that son was wallowing in the pigs. He spent all his dad's fortune and thought he couldn't even go back. But his daddy was waiting there with his arms wide open. The Father's waiting on you. When you sin, don't run away from Him. He knew you were going to mess up before you even did it. The moment we repent, He casts our sin into the sea of forgetfulness. So say this prayer after me: Father, I've messed up. I'm wayward. I ask you to forgive me. I want you to cleanse me by your blood. Thank you that my name is written in the Lamb's Book of Life. I want to come home again. Just wait on Him; He'll say, 'Welcome home.' We need to know that Jesus loves us today. For those who are wayward, run to Jesus. I'm so unworthy of His love because I've been a knucklehead a lot, and He's such an awesome God. I'm going to pray for healing in your bodies. Jesus took it all on the cross for you to walk in divine health. By His stripes you are healed. Father, I thank you right now for healing in their bodies. We thank you that you deliver us from addictions. Strongholds with the mind—PTSD, schizophrenia, bipolar disorder—it doesn't matter. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory. We call their marriages restored. We believe that today the wayward children are coming home and the wayward people are coming back to You. For whom the Son has set free is free indeed. I call their minds free in Jesus' name. They are no longer bound by demonic forces. I wanted to show you more people talking about these things, not to scare you but to prepare you. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much. God bless you all.]
